title: Hand-Made Blown Art Bud Glass Vase Clear Flower Bud Vase Single Stem Vases Decorative Glass Vase Bottles Centerpiece for Wedding Party Home and Office Décor(Grey), M (WTTC97768)
features: Crafted of premium, blemish-free, crystal clear glass.The thickened base allows the vase to be stably placed on the tabletop.
Classic design, smooth and beautiful lines, simple and fashionable.Excellent desktop decoration.Perfect fit for office or home décor.
Suitable for filling 1-2 bouquets,such as roses, carnations, roses, daisies and similar bouquets that are not too big.
Each vase is individually mouth blown and hand-made by skilled craftsmen, so there will be some subtle differences.
